name: Cloudflare Sandboxes
notes: Persistence is described in terms of external object storage (R2) and production deployment; the public docs do not claim that internal ephemeral memory is preserved across restarts, so ephemeral state should be treated as non-persistent unless explicitly persisted externally.
pricing_model: Active CPU pricing, billed on cycles used
summary: Cloudflare Sandboxes provide secure, isolated Linux environments for executing untrusted code. They are primarily used by developers building AI agents, interactive development environments, data analysis platforms, and CI/CD systems.
